task_completion.description: Load the original Fells Loop track/route into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Fells Loop' or 'fells_loop.gpx' in the layers panel, places list, or map view of a GIS/mapping application.

task_completion.description: Create a new track or route named 'Extraction_Path'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new item in the layers or tracks list explicitly named 'Extraction_Path'.
Look for the agent using a 'Reverse', 'Invert', or 'Reverse Direction' tool/menu option on the 'Extraction_Path', or visual indicators (like arrows) showing the path direction is reversed.

task_completion.description: Set the color of the 'Extraction_Path' to Blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the properties window of 'Extraction_Path' showing the color set to Blue, or the path itself appearing blue on the map.
Look for a 'Save As', 'Export', or similar dialog showing the file name 'extraction_path.gpx' being saved in the 'C:\workspace\' directory.

task_completion.description: Ensure the original Fells Loop track is not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the original 'Fells Loop' item still existing in the layers/items list alongside the new 'Extraction_Path', without any changes to its name or properties.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical mapping/GIS application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a mapping application (like QGIS, Google Earth, or Garmin BaseCamp) being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit the GPX XML file in a text editor to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent typing XML tags like <trk> or <rte> in a text editor (e.g., Notepad, VS Code) to complete the task.

integrity.description: The export process was performed through the application's export/save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard application save/export dialogs rather than command-line file copying or text editor saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is 'C:\workspace\extraction_path.gpx'. The new track must be named 'Extraction_Path' and colored Blue. The original track is located at 'C:\workspace\data\fells_loop.gpx'. Note: The original file actually contains a route rather than a track, so the agent might be working with routes instead of tracks, which is acceptable as long as the naming, coloring, reversing, and exporting steps are performed.
